name: integration_ph_launch_gately_everything_you_need_
method: [PH LAUNCH] Gately: Everything you need to build your own membership

phases.name: scrape_ph_launches
steps: scrape PH /topics/memberships + /topics/community daily via Playwright MCP
extract: tool name, upvotes, pricing, pain points from comments, maker Twitter

phases.name: analyze_and_route
steps: score each launch: upvotes > 200 = outbound target, upvotes 50-200 = content seed
extract affiliate program existence (check homepage for /affiliates or /partners)
classify positioning gap vs existing PRINTMAXX tools

phases.name: generate_output
steps: pipe to engagement_bait_converter.py for content angles
append high-upvote maker emails to EAS lead pipeline if founder email found
queue affiliate comparison post to CONTENT/social/posting_queue/
